'''DFS-1VR''' was the designation of a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class starfighter]] in the service of the [[Trade Defense Force|Trade Federation navy]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].<ref name="Film">{{Film|I}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
DFS-1VR first appeared in {{Film|I}}, the first film in the [[Prequel trilogy]] of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' film franchise.<ref name="Film" /> The droid starfighter was subsequently identified in the [[Sith Rising]] expansion for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'', receiving its own card in the [[2002]] expansion.<ref name="card" />
